title: Lenor Outdoorable Spring Awakening Fabric Conditioner 3 x 50 Washes (150 Washes Total)
features: Infused with a blend of crisp and clean notes, this fabric conditioner keeps your laundry smelling freshly air-dried while providing lasting softness
description: Product description Bring the freshness of the outdoors into your laundry with Lenor Outdoorable Spring Awakening Fabric Conditioner. Its concentrated formula provides long-lasting freshness, leaving clothes irresistibly soft and infused with the crisp, clean scent of spring air. Designed to deliver the freshness of line-dried laundry even when dried indoors. Ingredients >30% Cationic Surfactants, Perfumes, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Benzyl Benzoate, Citronellol, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, Linalool Directions Add 15ml (approx. 1 capful) to the rinse dispenser of your washing machine during the rinse cycle.
